name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: FWD: The President’s Birthday Card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
There's still time to sign the President's birthday card... |

Peter,

Did you see this note from the First Lady?

Next week, we'll be presenting President Trump his official birthday card signed by millions of Americans just like you.

And Peter, we wanted to be sure you didn't miss the chance to join us in our celebrations.

[**So if you haven 't already, be sure to sign your name to the President's official birthday card before 9:00 PM on Wednesday, June 14.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/ojlcrgzplvfdwgwgdknkzdszmsdpmmkncjwkjtstjkkljz_atkmttsppbh_qdphppph.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

P.S. - This is President Trump's first birthday in the White House working for the American people and we want to make sure it's one he'll never forget. **[Sign the official card today!](http://click1.action.gop.com/lgwfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgddngg_atkmttsppbh_rltwtttw.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)**

[SIGN THE CARD](http://click1.action.gop.com/cpqkjrdslnhfcrcrfgzgdfvdqvfsqqgzkpcgptvtpgglpg_atkmttsppbh_pvcdcccd.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

**\---------- Forwarded message ----------**
From: Melania Trump
Date: June 8th, 2017 at 10:17 AM
Subject: The President's Birthday Card
To: [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://click1.action.gop.com/pjvrctqglsfbmtmtbykyqbwqdwbgddykrjmyjhwhjyyljm_atkmttsppbh_qdphppph.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/ugyzpbqjfdysnbnbsgkgqsvqmvsjmmgkzwngwhvhwggfwf_atkmttsppbh_icnznnnz.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

Peter,

I wanted to save reaching out to you for a very special event.

On June 14, 2017, President Trump will turn 71, and I need your help to make it a birthday my husband will never forget.

Our celebrations always include family and close friends.

You have certainly proven yourself to be a loyal friend of my husband through your support of his positive vision to Make America Great Again and your unwavering commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Please, join me in celebrating Donald's 71st birthday by signing the card before the deadline, 9:00 PM on June 14, 2017.](http://click1.action.gop.com/drtldkpbmngfckckfrwrpfzpszfbssrwlhcrhtzthrrmhd_atkmttsppbh_spslsssl.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

And to make it even more special, be sure to include your personal message.**

Peter, Donald will be glad to hear from friends like you who have meant so much to his and our Party's success.

[**So please, take a moment to sign the President 's birthday card. Your support and kind wishes mean so much to our family.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/cgdkjrdslnhfcrcrfgzgdfvdqvfsqqgzkpcgptvtpgglpq_atkmttsppbh_tpmjmmmj.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

Warmly,

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/tbhdmfztcgwkvfvfkbrbzkszjsktjjbrdhvbhlslhbbchp_atkmttsppbh_qdphppph.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)
Melania Trump

[SIGN THE CARD](http://click1.action.gop.com/skmzsfrgkdjtmfmftchcrtwrlwtgllchzvmcvbwbvcckcj_atkmttsppbh_cmjqjjjq.html?a=1260&b=87778&c=17786605)

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click1.action.gop.com/nppcrhybpzwndhdhntmtyngyjgnbjjtmcfdtfqgqfttptq_atkmttsppbh_icnznnnz.html?a=17786605) | [Unsubscribe](http://click1.action.gop.com/lnwfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgddndk_atkmttsppbh_nkrjrrrj.html?a=17786605)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: ➡️ SURVEY ENCLOSED FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, can you let me know what you think by answering this very quick survey?
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42730737:slZt0t2Nr:m:1:1328517760:18D0CDBB757CE5C2889D9C4097824D75:r)
---
Friend,

I need the advice and support of grassroots activists like you now more than ever.

**I am conducting my annual survey of voters in Florida and all across the nation to find out how you feel about the progress Republicans in the U.S. Senate have been making and where you want us to focus our attention for the rest of the year.**

We have begun 2017 by rolling back major portions of the Obama agenda, especially many of his job-killing regulations. A new pro-Constitution U.S. Supreme Court Justice has been confirmed, and legislation on health care, border security and tax reform is in the works.

But obviously, there is much left to be done to turn our nation around.

**That's why I am reaching out to find out which issues you believe our Republican majority in the United States Senate should prioritize in the coming months. Will you please let me know by clicking on the button below?**

| [** 2017 Senate Leadership Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42730737:slZt0t2Nr:m:1:1328517760:18D0CDBB757CE5C2889D9C4097824D75:r)
---

Friend, your opinions matter to me. I appreciate all you did during 2016 to help my campaign and I want to make every effort possible to keep in touch with you, listen to your feedback and address your concerns.

I am proud to be a leading voice for conservative reform, fiscal responsibility and a renewed national commitment to a foreign policy of "peace through strength."

There has been an awful lot of discord in Washington, D.C. since the last election. The liberal Democrats have used every stalling tactic and method of delay they can find to slow confirmation of administration appointees and try to block passage of reform legislation.

Their bitter obstructionism is an embarrassment to the institution of the U.S. Senate and an insult to the American people. The Democrats have put partisanship before the best interests of the country on issue, after issue, after issue.

And the biased media "echo chamber" repeats and amplifies the liberals' bitter attacks and phony misrepresentations of our Republican agenda.

**But I know that the Democrats and their allies in the media don't speak for Main Street Americans like you.**

[** 2017 Senate Leadership Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42730737:slZt0t2Nr:m:1:1328517760:18D0CDBB757CE5C2889D9C4097824D75:r)
---

That's why conducting my own grassroots opinion poll is so important to me.

Friend, the information gathered from my 2017 Senate Leadership Survey will help Republican leaders and me target legislative efforts to ensure that grassroots Republicans are focused and ready to act in support of our actions.

**So please, take a few minutes to complete the survey right away.**

Thank you for your steadfast support and continued commitment to our nation.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

[** 2017 Senate Leadership Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42730737:slZt0t2Nr:m:1:1328517760:18D0CDBB757CE5C2889D9C4097824D75:r)
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 4, 2016.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/islZt0t2Nr). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslZt0t2Nr)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslZt0t2Nr) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-44626229158-echo3-0C076A3CE63BBBC2251BC3C6A57FF19E@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name to stop Betsy DeVos:
body:
Trump's budget does zero favors for America's children.
---
**Donald Trump's budget is a direct assault on our children and their education. Add your name to tell Congress to reject it:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Trumps-Education-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170610_dnc_nd&source=em_20170610_dnc_nd")**
Derek --

Betsy DeVos was on Capitol Hill this week trying to drum up support for the Trump administration's budget -- and its massive cuts to education.

Trump and DeVos want to cut a whopping $9 billion from education. They'd cut funding for vocational programs that help people find jobs, before- and after-school programs, teacher training, and more critical services that give our kids the best shot at success.

Every student should have access to an education that prepares them for the future. But Trump and DeVos would dismantle public education -- all to fund "school choice" programs that hurt students and give massive tax cuts for the millionaires and billionaires.

**Make sure Republicans know that if they vote for the Trump/DeVos education cuts, we'll vote them out of office. Add your name right now:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Trumps-Education-Budget1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170610_dnc_nd&source=em_20170610_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc22/4067b0a/2b7afe82d/7e69cc90/46510094/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170610_dnc_nd&source=em_20170610_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc22/4067b0a/2b7afe82d/7e69cc91/46510094/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170610_dnc_nd&source=em_20170610_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc22/4067b0a/2b7afe82d/7e69cc9e/46510094/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170610_dnc_nd&source=em_20170610_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc22/4067b0a/2b7afe82d/7e69cc9f/46510094/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170610_dnc_nd&source=em_20170610_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My friend Ralph
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

**When I was first elected governor of Virginia, secondhand smoke was killing about 1,700 Virginians every year.** We needed to do something about it, and I started looking around for like-minded people. A pediatrician in the state senate named Ralph Northam seemed like a natural ally.

**Ralph and I worked hand-in-hand to protect Virginians from secondhand smoke.** I told him he'd make a fantastic governor one day -- and today, he is the right person for the job.

**[Ralph works across the aisle to put Virginians first. Help him become Virginia's next governor by making a grassroots contribution to his team.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ccK0niIzauoZ58v2xUb7lPpMhzFqUnRH)**

During the fight against secondhand smoke, Ralph was a true workhorse. He got stuff done behind the scenes -- went to committee hearings and made sure it got to my desk. All to protect Virginia families.

That's who Ralph is. He's not here for the glory, he's here to make a difference in people's lives. He did it as a pediatrician, and he'll do it as Virginia's next governor.

**[Ralph's critical primary election is right around the corner. Make a contribution and give his team the resources they need to win.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=b5rvrVY%2ByHV1lt3Wic1NwDIrSR3G09jj)**

Thanks,

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0yRgq9l5VDGQT7BNd90Mh%2FpMhzFqUnRH)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AE6wb3nAxXreEgYw8klG%2BDIrSR3G09jj).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

All to protect Virginia families. That's who Ralph is. He's not here for the glory, he's here to make a difference in people's lives. He did it as a pediatrician, and he'll do it as Virginia's next governor. Thanks, Tim | | Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: mindy@dscc.org
subject: A bunch of men in a backroom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republicans are trying to repeal Obamacare without public hearings. Don't let it happen.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170610-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

Eight years ago, Democrats held numerous hearings over the Affordable Care Act. Dozens of Republican amendments were added to the bill during that process.

Yet Republicans have not held a single public hearing in the House or Senate on their bill to repeal Obamacare.

Instead, Mitch McConnell just implemented an obscure Senate rule that will allow Republicans to skip the entire hearing process, leaving a bunch of men in a backroom to decide the shape of the repeal bill.

**We cannot allow Republicans to force through Obamacare repeal with such a shocking lack of transparency.**

[**Without hearings, a vote could happen as soon as this week. Chip in $1 right now to fund our ads and all efforts to pressure Republicans into backing off their secret process to repeal Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170610-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

It is absolutely mind-boggling that Republicans won't even hold a public hearing on a bill that affects one-sixth of our economy, that would raise health care costs for millions of Americans, and that would deny coverage to millions more.

They won't give Democrats the opportunity to offer a single amendment either -- even though _dozens_ of GOP amendments were accepted when the Affordable Care Act was in the Senate.

Instead, Republicans are rushing to pass a bill with just 50 votes, with the tie broken by Vice President Pence -- and they're counting on a lack of public attention to force it through. They think that if they don't hold hearings, no one will hold them accountable.

**We need to show that 's not true. Chip in $1 now to prove to Republicans that no matter how secretive they are, we'll hold them accountable for their disastrous repeal plan:

[http://dscc.org/stop-aca-repeal](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170610-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Mindy

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e506/2b07114c/2e22c9d0/736f7ef0/53807336/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e506/2b07114c/2e22c9d0/736f7ef3/53807336/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e506/2b07114c/2e22c9d0/736f7ef2/53807336/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Livestream link for Bernie at the People's Summit
body:
RSVP to watch Bernie's speech to hear the discussion on how we can move from resisting to reclaiming the halls of government
#
Friends,
Progressives from across the country are gathering in Chicago this weekend for the People's Summit, a grassroots showcase of organizations and individuals leading the way forward for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice. Our Revolution will be there, as will Senator Bernie Sanders, who will be speaking about the future of the political revolution.
Last year's presidential campaign helped set up our vision for what this country must become for all of its people--a place where everyone can receive world class health care, quality education, and make a living wage that enables them to take care of their family and get ahead. How can we accomplish this in the current political environment? That is what we will hear Bernie lay out at the People's Summit, and why it's so critical you join us and be a part of it.
RSVP to watch Bernie's speech to hear the discussion on how we can move from resisting to reclaiming the halls of government, ensuring that they work for all of us--not just those on top.
**[People's Summit Livestream with Bernie Sanders](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d93/43f17890/d1501a10/620379b6/584786740/VEsH/ "https://ourrevolution.com/political-revolution-now-senator-bernie-sanders/?source=em170610-full")**
Saturday, June 10, 2017
8:00 PM EDT
**[RSVP TO WATCH»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d93/43f17890/d1501a10/620379b6/584786740/VEsE/ "https://ourrevolution.com/political-revolution-now-senator-bernie-sanders/?source=em170610-full")**
Our Revolution will be joined at the People's Summit by our partners in political revolution, including unions, activists, and advocacy groups who have marched, made phone calls, and organized by our side for as long as Our Revolution has been around.
The People's Summit is our next opportunity to show the power of our movement. We hope you'll tune in to watch Bernie tonight.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d93/43f17890/d1501a10/620379b7/584786740/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d93/43f17890/d1501a10/620379b4/584786740/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d93/43f17890/d1501a10/620379b5/584786740/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Veteran, pediatrician, leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Ralph Northam is a veteran, a pediatrician, and an outstanding lieutenant governor. I've worked with him personally, so I know the kind of leadership he can bring to Virginia as our Commonwealth's next governor.

**[Ralph's team is working hard to win this primary, and I want to give them a grassroots boost. Please, chip in $5, $10, $20 if you can, and help Ralph's team get out the vote.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Y7s43FUKs6rX02g9ytQYMneKYy2dnVnV)**

Polls in Virginia open in 2 days, and every second counts. If you can step up, it would mean a lot.

Thanks for your help,

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tCrJ5le%2F5Ja9fkl1kyM1e3eKYy2dnVnV)
---
| In connection with this mailer, we are soliciting only donations of up to $2,700 from individuals and up to $5,000 from multi-candidate political committees. We are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks in connection with this mailer.

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XMbKbFOq6f4S7rFhcyyGY3eKYy2dnVnV).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Justin Atkins, FlaDems.com
subject: need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend,

I'm proud to lead the College Democrats of Florida. Democrats work hard to ensure an equal playing field for all. That's why I'm excited to work toward a strong Leadership Blue event.

We help Democrats suffering from the crushing burden of student debt. We help folks working three jobs just to make ends meet, and seniors living with the constant threat of losing Social Security and Medicare.

**[But this time, we need your help. Can you pitch in $3 today to help support Florida College Democrats ahead of Leadership Blue? Every dollar given through this link will help College Democrats attend this year's event.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+But+this+time+we+need+your+help+Can+you+&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")** _If you've saved your payment information in ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Donate $3 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2f0/1a5213b3/77c7bee7/718b8eff/3543069279/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")
[Donate $20 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2f0/1a5213b3/77c7bee7/718b8efe/3543069279/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?express_lane=true&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")
[Donate $50 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2f0/1a5213b3/77c7bee7/718b8ef9/3543069279/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")
[Donate $100 now!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2f0/1a5213b3/77c7bee7/718b8ef8/3543069279/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")
[Or donate another amount.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")** We have over 40 requests from College Democrats to attend this year's Leadership Blue conference. This event will ensure we have the ability to organize and work to fight back against extremist Republicans in Florida and nationwide.

[**We 've already raised $2,000 -- now we're only $10,000 away from our goal. Can you help us meet this goal?**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-support-2017?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Wersquove+already+raised+2000++now+wersq&utm_campaign=em060917_leadershipblue&source=em060917_leadershipblue&refcode=em060917_leadershipblue")

We can't do this without you.

Thanks,
Justin Atkins
President, College Democrats of Florida
